text.title: Dep Bump Batching Strategy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Dep Bump Batching Strategy end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: inventory
step.action: Run `npm outdated` / `pip list --outdated` / equivalent; capture into raw table.

step.name: classify
step.action: Tag each row with semver tier (patch/minor/major) and blast_radius score.

step.name: batch
step.action: Group rows per the split-by-semver-tier rule; assemble batch objects.

step.name: gate
step.action: Attach CI gate ids + rollback recipe per batch.

step.name: emit
step.action: Write artefact JSON; run validate-dep-bump-batching-strategy.py; surface for review.
